title: Producing and selling cannabis - Canada.ca
content:
## Producing and selling cannabis
Health Canada and the Public Health Agency of Canada have published a joint red tape reduction report that identifies 42 key initiatives to reduce red tape. These include:
- reducing administrative burden in the cannabis program
- streamlining requirements of the Cannabis Regulations
- streamlining the Cannabis Tracking System Order
General information about cannabis licences, applying for a  licence, managing a licence.

## Services and information

### Licensed  cultivators, processors and sellers of cannabis
List of cultivators, processors and sellers of  cannabis that are authorized by Health Canada.

### Industry  guidelines and requirements
Rules  for import and export, production, advertising, packaging, labelling and  shipping, classifying edible cannabis, reporting. About fees, compliance and  enforcement, penalties.

### Types  of cannabis and industrial hemp licences
Licences  to grow, process, sell, test and perform research on cannabis and industrial  hemp, permits for import and export.

### New  cannabis licence holders: Cultivation, processing or sale for medical purposes  licences
About your new licence, including conditions,  authorized activities, reporting requirements, managing your licence.

### Laboratories  authorized to conduct analytical testing
List of laboratories  authorized by Health Canada to conduct analytical testing of cannabis.

### Updates  for cannabis and industrial hemp
Recent notices and updates from Health Canada  for the cannabis and industrial hemp industry.

### Types  of research with cannabis
Overview on conducting research with  cannabis, types of research studies including studies involving humans, clinical  trials.

### Contact information for licence  holders, applicants and industry
Contact information within the Government of Canada  if you have questions about cannabis and industrial hemp.

### Apply for a cultivation, processing or sale for medical purposes  licence
The application process for a medical purposes licence, what you  need to prepare before you apply, how to apply.

### Apply  for a research licence
The application  process for a research licence, what you need to prepare before you apply, how  to apply.

### Apply  for an analytical testing licence
The application  process for a licence to conduct analytical testing, how to apply.

### Apply  for a cannabis drug licence
The application  process for a licence to produce, sell or distribute drugs containing cannabis,  how to apply.

### Manage  your cultivation, processing or sale for medical purposes licence
Types of licence change requests, how to make changes to  your licence, such as to the site plan, sale activities, licence class,  renewing and ceasing activities.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
